channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/20)
channel.description: 今天的信息流里，关于“如何用 AI 工具实际写代码”的讨论特别多，从工具选择、工作流搭建到具体问题吐槽，非常接地气。同时，AI 代理（Agent）的生态也在快速演进，出现了更垂直、更自动化的项目。还有两件行业大事值得留意：Anthropic 对开源竞品 OpenCode 采取法律行动，以及 OpenAI 收购了著名的 Python 工具公司 Astral（Ruff 和 UV 的创造者），这可能会影响未来的开发者工具格局。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的信息流里，关于“如何用 AI 工具实际写代码”的讨论特别多，从工具选择、工作流搭建到具体问题吐槽，非常接地气。同时，AI 代理（Agent）的生态也在快速演进，出现了更垂直、更自动化的项目。还有两件行业大事值得留意：Anthropic 对开源竞品 OpenCode 采取法律行动，以及 OpenAI 收购了著名的 Python 工具公司 Astral（Ruff 和 UV 的创造者），这可能会影响未来的开发者工具格局。

item.title: aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw
item.description: Fully autonomous & self-evolving research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. 🦞 | 近期热门 | 总 6809 stars
item.author: aiming-lab

item.title: calesthio/Crucix
item.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes. | 近期热门 | 总 5200 stars
item.author: calesthio

item.title: jackwener/opencli
item.description: Make any website your CLI. A powerful, AI-native runtime for seamless browser automation and dynamic web data extraction. | 近期热门 | 总 2541 stars
item.author: jackwener

item.title: HKUDS/ClawTeam
item.description: ClawTeam: Agent Swarm Intelligence (One Command → Full Automation) | 近期热门 | 总 1726 stars
item.author: HKUDS

item.title: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel
item.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it. | 近期热门 | 总 1137 stars
item.author: Infatoshi

item.title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
item.description: Claude Code skills that turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about (Multi-platform e.g., Codex are supported). | 近期热门 | 总 1091 stars
item.author: Lum1104

item.title: lcoutodemos/clui-cc
item.description: Clui CC — Command Line User Interface for Claude Code | 近期热门 | 总 832 stars
item.author: lcoutodemos

item.title: zerobootdev/zeroboot
item.description: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes for AI agents via copy-on-write forking | 近期热门 | 总 831 stars
item.author: zerobootdev

item.title: nikmcfly/MiroFish-Offline
item.description: Offline multi-agent simulation & prediction engine. English fork of MiroFish with Neo4j + Ollama local stack. | 近期热门 | 总 790 stars
item.author: nikmcfly

item.title: liliMozi/openhanako
item.description: A personal AI agent with memory, personality, and autonomy — built on Electron. | 近期热门 | 总 389 stars
item.author: liliMozi
